phrases.intent_en: Where does the Rose Valley trail split?
phrases.cultural_note: Unmarked trail forks are explicitly listed as brittle details; the safety prefix avoids inventing a location.

likely_response.translation_en: Next to the big rock, on the left.

responses.english: Next to the big rock, on the left.

phrases.intent_en: Where does the Rose Valley trail split?
phrases.text_local: Çavuşin tarafına giden patika nereden başlıyor?
phrases.cultural_note: Trail junctions can be unmarked. The venue context lists 'Unmarked trail forks' as a brittle detail, so a direct answer is avoided for safety.

likely_response.translation_en: After the Red Valley viewpoint, on the right.

responses.english: After the Red Valley viewpoint, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Kızılçukur gün batımı seyir noktası nerede?
phrases.cultural_note: Turkish uses 'seyir noktası' for viewpoint. Exact trail directions are not provided, so deferring to staff is safest.

likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the trail, on the right side.

responses.english: At the end of the trail, on the right side.
